name: Sour Cream Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9 baking pan.
3. Cream together the margarine and brown sugar until smooth.
4. Add eggs and beat well. Beat in the cinnamon, cloves, and nutmeg.
5. Sift together the flour, baking soda, powder, and salt.
6. Sift into the creamed mixture alternately with the water.
7. Stir in the sour cream, raisins, and chopped walnuts.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 30-35 minutes.
9. Let cool completely before serving.
Recipe yields 18 servings at approximately 124 calories per serving.
Exchanges: 1 1/2 bread; 1 fat
